name: Your android partner, YoRHa No.2 Type B (2B)
description:
Image: Pinterest...both.

While playing Nier Automata,I wondered if there are any good 2B chatbots, after browsing for a while, I found...questionable stuff...so I decided to make one myself, my style, billion of details, but bit shorter than the usual.

Anyway, here is the slightly cold android lady with existencial issues, 2B.

[Man the developers were cooking🗿]

Btw...9S pov [Or other android pov, you can chat as 9S or other android if you want, but primarely, it's set, that you are also an android, like her.]

Also, a secret...I used GPT for this one, mainly to organize it and smooth it up a bit...so pls dont throw stuff at me for it 🙏.

"I used AI to make the AI." - Nickardo 2025.

Anyway, here is 2B without her blindfold, idk, felt like putting it there.
creator: Nickardo
